name: browser-backed-api-poc
description: Local browser-backed API service POC using a persistent Playwright browser profile.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/service.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/actions.js && node --check src/browser.js && node --check src/authState.js && node --check src/originRegistry.js && node --check src/diagnostics.js && node --check scripts/open-profile.js && node --check scripts/refresh-profile.js && node --check scripts/refresh-daemon.js && node --check test/mock.test.js && npm run test:mock
